design_note: Each of the 12 Bank endpoints has exactly 40 functional test cases. Missing and invalid inputs are split into separate granular cases rather than lumped into generic validations.

test_cases.test_description: Verify valid affiliate portfolio retrieval succeeds within authorized scope.
Verify Service Provider can access affiliate portfolio retrieval in read-only oversight mode where permitted.
Verify bank user can access affiliate portfolio retrieval for own bank.
Verify bank user cannot access affiliate portfolio retrieval for another bank.
test_cases.preconditions: Bank A user; target bank is Bank B.

test_cases.test_description: Verify unknown bankId returns not found.
Verify malformed bankId is rejected.
Verify unauthenticated caller cannot access affiliate portfolio retrieval.
Verify invalid token is rejected.
Verify unsupported role is rejected.
Verify forbidden responses do not leak bank data.
test_cases.expected_result: 403/404 response contains no sensitive bank metrics/data.

test_cases.test_description: Verify affiliate portfolio retrieval response contract is valid.
test_cases.expected_result: Response fields and types match SRS contract.

test_cases.test_description: Verify affiliate portfolio retrieval does not mutate state.
Verify access to affiliate portfolio retrieval is audited where required.
test_cases.expected_result: AuditLog entry created where policy requires.

test_cases.test_description: Verify response includes affiliateId.
Verify response includes tenantId.
Verify response includes affiliateName.
Verify response includes totalCards.
Verify response includes activeCards.
Verify response includes fundingVolume.
Verify response includes relationshipStatus.
Verify pagination page 1 works where endpoint returns collections.
test_cases.expected_result: 200 OK with page metadata and data.

test_cases.test_description: Verify pagination page 2 works where applicable.
Verify empty collection result is well formed.
test_cases.expected_result: 200 OK with empty data array and metadata.

test_cases.test_description: Verify unknown sort field is rejected.
Verify supported sort works.
Verify search handles special characters safely.
Verify pageSize=0 is rejected.
Verify excessive pageSize is rejected or capped.
test_cases.expected_result: 400 Bad Request; rejected or capped according to policy.

test_cases.expected_result: 200; Only records matching dateRange are returned.

test_cases.expected_result: 200; Only records matching actor are returned.

test_cases.expected_result: 200; Only records matching eventType are returned.

test_cases.expected_result: 200 OK with page metadata and data.

test_cases.test_description: Verify pagination page 2 works where applicable.
Verify page=0 is rejected.
Verify pageSize=0 is rejected.

test_cases.test_description: Verify multiple filters apply AND semantics.
test_cases.expected_result: Every returned record matches all filters.

test_cases.preconditions: Authorized caller; matching and non-matching records exist.
test_cases.expected_result: 200; Only records matching status are returned.

test_cases.test_description: Verify status filter by currency returns only matching records.
test_cases.preconditions: Authorized caller; banks exist with the target currency.
test_cases.input_data: Body filters.currency = a known currency code (e.g. USD).
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.
test_cases.expected_result: 200; Only records matching the currency filter are returned.

test_cases.test_description: Verify search filter returns matching records by partial name/identifier.
test_cases.preconditions: Authorized caller; banks exist with names matching the search token.
test_cases.input_data: Body filters.search = a known token from a bank's legalName/shortName.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.
test_cases.expected_result: 200; Only records matching the search token are returned.

test_cases.test_description: Verify pagination page 1 works where endpoint returns collections.
test_cases.expected_result: 200 OK with page metadata and data.

test_cases.test_description: Verify pagination page 2 works where applicable.
Verify page=0 is rejected.
Verify pageSize=0 is rejected.
Verify excessive pageSize is rejected or capped.
test_cases.expected_result: 400 Bad Request; rejected or capped according to policy.

test_cases.test_description: Verify empty collection result is well formed.
test_cases.expected_result: 200 OK with empty data array and metadata.

test_cases.test_description: Verify multiple filters apply AND semantics.
test_cases.expected_result: Every returned record matches all filters.

test_cases.test_description: Verify search handles special characters safely.
Verify request with an expired bearer token is rejected.
test_cases.preconditions: Bearer token whose `exp` claim is in the past.
test_cases.input_data: Authorization: Bearer <expired JWT>; valid query parameters.
steps: Validate response status, response body, scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.
test_cases.expected_result: 401 Unauthorized; reason indicates token expiry where contract permits; never 200.

test_cases.test_description: Verify request with a structurally malformed JWT (not three dot-separated segments) is rejected.
test_cases.input_data: Authorization: Bearer not.a.jwt.token.really; valid query parameters.
steps: Validate response status, response body, scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.

test_cases.test_description: Verify ?country=NG filters results to banks whose country matches.
test_cases.preconditions: Banks in multiple countries seeded; authorized user.
steps: Validate response status, response body, scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.

test_cases.test_description: Verify negative page parameter is rejected with validation error.
steps: Validate response status, response body, scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.

test_cases.test_description: Verify negative pageSize parameter is rejected with validation error.
steps: Validate response status, response body, scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.

test_cases.test_description: Verify N concurrent identical queries return the same result set (read consistency).
test_cases.preconditions: Stable bank list; no concurrent writes.
test_cases.input_data: Same GET request fired N=5 times in parallel.
steps: Validate response status, response body, scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.
test_cases.expected_result: All return 200; result sets identical (same IDs in same order).

test_cases.test_description: Verify bank-scoped affiliate suspension succeeds for an eligible affiliate within bank scope.
test_cases.preconditions: Authorized bank user; affiliate linked to bank; relationship eligible.
test_cases.expected_result: 200 OK; relationship status set to SUSPENDED; applicable cards frozen.

test_cases.test_description: Verify bank-scoped affiliate suspension succeeds with minimum required fields.
Verify malformed bankId is rejected.
Verify unknown bankId returns not found.
Verify malformed affiliateId is rejected.
Verify unknown affiliateId returns not found.
Verify affiliate not linked to bank is rejected.
test_cases.preconditions: Bank user; affiliate not in bank portfolio.

test_cases.test_description: Verify reason max length is enforced.
Verify duplicate SUSPENDED transition is rejected or idempotent.
test_cases.expected_result: 409 Conflict or current-state response; no duplicate side effects.

test_cases.test_description: Verify invalid source relationship state is rejected.
Verify unauthenticated caller cannot perform bank-scoped affiliate suspension.
Verify invalid token is rejected.
Verify bank user cannot act outside own bank scope.
test_cases.preconditions: Bank A user; path bankId is Bank B.

test_cases.test_description: Verify Service Provider access follows policy.
test_cases.expected_result: Allowed only if policy permits; otherwise 403.

test_cases.test_description: Verify no cards issued by other banks are affected.
test_cases.preconditions: Affiliate has cards issued by other banks.

test_cases.test_description: Verify action handles affiliate with no cards under bank.
test_cases.preconditions: Affiliate linked to bank but has no cards.
test_cases.expected_result: Relationship status updated; cascade count zero.

test_cases.test_description: Verify completion confirmation returned after processing.
test_cases.expected_result: Response confirms relationship and cascade completion/partial result.

test_cases.test_description: Verify action is audited.
test_cases.expected_result: 200 OK; AuditLog includes actor, bank, affiliate, reason, timestamp, outcome.

test_cases.test_description: Verify actor metadata is captured.
Verify action timestamp is captured.
Verify duplicate requestId does not duplicate cascade.
test_cases.expected_result: No duplicate cascade or duplicate audit success.

test_cases.test_description: Verify empty body rejected when reason is required.
Verify malformed JSON rejected.
Verify unsupported content type rejected.
Verify reason special characters handled safely.
test_cases.expected_result: Accepted and stored safely or rejected by policy.

test_cases.test_description: Verify script-like reason is rejected or escaped.
Verify read-after-action returns updated relationship status.
Verify status history entry is created.
Verify failed validation does not create success audit.
Verify concurrent conflicting transitions handled deterministically.
test_cases.expected_result: One succeeds; conflicting one returns 409/current state.

test_cases.test_description: Verify missing bankId path is rejected.
Verify missing affiliateId path is rejected.
Verify reason is required.
Verify blank reason is rejected.
Verify unsupported reasonCode is rejected.
Verify non-bank role is rejected where endpoint is bank controlled.
Verify relationship status becomes SUSPENDED.
Verify only cards issued by authenticated bank are selected for cascade.

test_cases.test_description: Verify partial CMS cascade failures are retried by policy.
test_cases.preconditions: Some card cascade actions fail transiently.
test_cases.expected_result: Failed card actions retried according to configured policy.

test_cases.test_description: Verify response reports partial cascade results.
test_cases.preconditions: Some card actions fail after retries.

test_cases.test_description: Verify Service Provider decision access follows policy.
test_cases.expected_result: Allowed only if policy permits; otherwise 403.

test_cases.test_description: Verify reason max length is enforced.

test_cases.test_description: Verify affiliate can see decision outcome.
Verify the bank-scoped cards listing returns matching cards.
test_cases.preconditions: Authorized Bank user; bank has issued cards.
test_cases.input_data: Valid filters object with sensible defaults; pagination page=1 pageSize=20.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.
test_cases.expected_result: 200 OK; response includes pagination metadata. NOTE: data array may be empty when the bank has no cards seeded â€” this is a data-dependent scenario.

test_cases.test_description: Verify success with only required fields.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.
test_cases.expected_result: 200 OK; response includes pagination metadata. NOTE: data-dependent.

test_cases.test_description: Verify malformed bankId is rejected.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.

test_cases.test_description: Verify 404 for unknown bankId.
test_cases.input_data: Path bankId = zero-GUID or non-existent ID.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.

test_cases.test_description: Verify status filter returns only matching cards.
test_cases.preconditions: Authorized Bank user; bank has cards in multiple states.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.
test_cases.expected_result: 200 OK; pagination metadata returned. NOTE: data-dependent â€” only ACTIVE cards (if any seeded) returned.

test_cases.test_description: Verify affiliateId filter returns only that affiliate's cards.
test_cases.preconditions: Authorized Bank user; bank has multiple affiliates with cards.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.
test_cases.expected_result: 200 OK; pagination metadata returned. NOTE: data-dependent â€” only the affiliate's cards (if any) returned.

test_cases.test_description: Verify fromDate..toDate range filters cards by issuance window.
test_cases.preconditions: Authorized Bank user; cards exist within and outside the window.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.
test_cases.expected_result: 200 OK; pagination metadata returned. NOTE: data-dependent â€” cards within window (if any).

test_cases.test_description: Verify malformed dates are rejected.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.

test_cases.test_description: Verify fromDate after toDate is rejected.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.

test_cases.test_description: Verify pagination page=1 succeeds.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.

test_cases.test_description: Verify page=0 is rejected.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.

test_cases.test_description: Verify pageSize=0 is rejected.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.

test_cases.test_description: Verify excessive pageSize is rejected or capped.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.
test_cases.expected_result: Rejected with 400/422 OR capped to backend max with 200.

test_cases.test_description: Verify unauthenticated request is rejected.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.

test_cases.test_description: Verify invalid token is rejected.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.

test_cases.test_description: Verify non-bank-user roles are rejected.
test_cases.preconditions: Authenticated affiliate user attempting bank-scoped read.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.

test_cases.test_description: Verify cross-bank read is rejected.
test_cases.preconditions: Authenticated bank user attempting to read another bank's cards.
test_cases.input_data: bankId path-var differs from caller's bank scope.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.

test_cases.test_description: Verify 403/404 responses contain no card metadata.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.

test_cases.test_description: Verify response shape matches SRS contract.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.
test_cases.expected_result: Response shape matches contract (bankId, page, pageSize, total, cards). NOTE: data array content data-dependent.

test_cases.test_description: Verify response includes data[] array.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.
test_cases.expected_result: Response includes the cards array (may be empty). NOTE: data-dependent for content.

test_cases.test_description: Verify response includes pagination metadata.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.
test_cases.expected_result: Response includes page, pageSize, total fields.

test_cases.test_description: Verify read does not mutate state.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.
test_cases.expected_result: 200 OK; no state mutation from read.

test_cases.test_description: Verify AuditLog entry created where policy requires.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.
test_cases.expected_result: 200 OK; AuditLog entry created where required (data-dependent for verification).

test_cases.test_description: Verify empty-result response is well-formed.
test_cases.preconditions: Authorized caller; filter that matches nothing.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.
test_cases.expected_result: 200 OK with empty cards array and pagination metadata. (Currently the default state â€” bank has no cards seeded.)

test_cases.test_description: Verify multiple filters AND-combine.
test_cases.preconditions: Authorized caller; cards exist matching subset of filters.
test_cases.input_data: filters with status + affiliateId + date range.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.
test_cases.expected_result: 200 OK; every returned record (if any) satisfies all filters. NOTE: data-dependent.

test_cases.test_description: Verify unsupported Content-Type is rejected.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.

test_cases.test_description: Verify malformed JSON is rejected.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.

test_cases.test_description: Verify each card record includes summary fields.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.
test_cases.expected_result: Each cards[] record (if any) includes cardId, status, affiliateId, productType, createdAt. NOTE: data-dependent.

test_cases.test_description: Verify invalid status enum rejected.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.

test_cases.test_description: Verify malformed affiliateId is rejected.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persisted state, scope behavior, and audit/trace side effects where applicable.
